original: This leash leads back to the mount you rented from Maja. Sadly, it won’t belch acid in combat like its younger kin. It also isn’t quite as fast as a kor’diiak or a nog’wich. However, if you need a brief sprint to carry you out of combat in a hurry, nothing beats a grunch.
context: <<POS:05358609>> e.tooltip='This leash leads back to the mount you rented from Maja. Sad'
